Kon Knueppel Makes NBA History: First Rookie to Lead League in 3-Pointers Made (273 Total)** | YES | HIGH confidence[4][3]

Kon Knueppel, Charlotte Hornets rookie and Swiss player, achieved a franchise-record 273 three-pointers in the regular season finale against the New York Knicks on Sunday, becoming the first rookie ever to lead the NBA in triples made[4][3]. This record caps his standout rook
